mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id as memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.register_date as regDate, m2.nickname, m2.phone_number as phoneNumber, NVL(ms_cur.status_code, 1) AS statusCode, ms_cur.memo FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, memo, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1 WHERE NVL(ms_cur.status_code, 1) != 4 ORDER BY m1.member_id DESC

SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.login_id AS loginId, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.gender, m1.birthday, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image AS profilePhoto, m2.bio, m2.phone_number AS phoneNumber, m2.last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, m2.equipped_badge_id AS equippedBadgeId, NVL(ms_cur.status_code, 1) AS statusCode,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report r WHERE r.target_id = m1.member_id) as reportCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, memo, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1 WHERE m1.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_USER' THEN 1 END) AS userCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_PARTNER' THEN 1 END) AS partnerCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' THEN 1 END) AS adminCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS activeCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS banCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 3 THEN 1 END) AS dormantCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN m1.status = 4 THEN 1 END) AS withdrawCount,
COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m1.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 END) AS todayNewCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(m1.register_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) THEN 1 END) AS yesterdayNewCount FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_cur.rn = 1

SELECT /* 전체 휴면 회원 수 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT member_id, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 AND t.status_code = 3 ) AS totalDormant,
/* 최근 7일 내 복귀 */ ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ms.member_id) FROM memberStatus ms WHERE ms.status_code = 1 AND ms.reg_date >= SYSDATE - 7 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM memberStatus ms2 WHERE ms2.member_id = ms.member_id AND ms2.status_code = 3 AND ms2.reg_date < ms.reg_date ) ) AS reactivatedCount FROM dual

SELECT m1.member_id AS memberId, m1.email, m2.nickname, m2.last_login_at AS lastLoginDate, ms_d.reg_date AS dormantDate, ADD_MONTHS(ms_d.reg_date, 12) AS deleteScheduledDate FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m1.member_id JOIN ( SELECT member_id, reg_date, status_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_id ORDER BY reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM memberStatus ) ms_d ON ms_d.member_id = m1.member_id AND ms_d.rn = 1 AND ms_d.status_code = 3 ORDER BY deleteScheduledDate ASC
